steps.title: Focus on the unknown age
steps.content: The crater could support the Younger Dryas impact theory only if it dates to the beginning of that cooling period. Berg's team has not yet determined the crater's age, so that link cannot be established. The conclusion must stay focused on timing, not crater size or impact cause.

steps.title: Reject unrelated uncertainties
steps.content: B shifts to whether a comet could make a large crater, C shifts to what object caused the crater, and D questions the period's start date. The team's uncertainty is about the crater's age. The answer is A.
